summary: The user is seeking advice on purchasing new dance shoes for salsa classes and improving their dancing skills. They are currently taking classes with an instructor named Alex and are focused on enhancing their footwork, timing, and overall technique in salsa dancing.
facts: The user is looking to buy new dance shoes for their salsa classes. The user's salsa instructor is named Alex. The user has been experiencing discomfort in their arch area and is prioritizing arch support in their new shoes. The user has been icing their feet after class to help with discomfort. The user is practicing a "forward and back" move taught by Alex last week. The user is trying to improve their timing and footwork in salsa dancing. The user plans to practice their timing and rhythm with a metronome and by listening to salsa music regularly. The user is interested in exercises to improve their balance and coordination for salsa. The user is incorporating tips for preventing foot pain and discomfort during and after salsa classes.
